definitions.text: A part of a larger whole, usually in such a form that it is able to be separated from other parts.
examples: I’d like another piece of pie.
I've lost a piece of this jigsaw puzzle.

definitions.text: A single item belonging to a class of similar items.

examples: These clues allowed us to piece together the solution to the mystery.

definitions.text: To make, enlarge, or repair, by the addition of a piece or pieces; to patch; often with out.
To produce a work of graffiti more complex than a tag.
